paragraph1: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer and Network Engineer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. I build modern, scalable web applications and design efficient network infrastructures.
paragraph2: With expertise in MERN Stack, PHP/Laravel, .NET, and Cisco networking, I bring both frontend creativity and backend robustness to every project.
paragraph3: My approach combines clean code practices with performance-driven architecture, ensuring every solution is both functional and maintainable.
